docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROYA NIKZAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KRISTA HENNESSEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY NIKZAD, ROYA AS TO DEFENDANT HENNESSEY, KRISTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $199.50 SERVED JAN-05-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HENNESSEY, KRISTA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIKZAD, ROYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENNESSEY, KRISTA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,180.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
